name: Paramount Bed Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Paramount Bed Holdings Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells hospital beds worldwide. The company offers mattresses and equipment for medical and nursing care environments; and home care products. It is also involved in the inspection and maintenance of Paramount bed products; and the leasing and wholesale of welfare care products. Paramount Bed Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
